text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All eyes are focused on Special Week and Seiun
Sky as the Kikuka Sho, the final race of the
Classic Triple Crown, is set to begin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo grumbles to herself that the crowd has
forgotten who the real star is as she approaches
the paddock.
